evaluators.name: Book Cheapest Oceanfront 1BR Oahu Condo Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched with appropriate filters for an oceanfront 1BR condo on Oahu under $250/night and started a booking for the cheapest qualifying option for a 4-night stay for 2 adults.

evaluators.name: Compare Maui vs Kauai 2BR Homes & Favorite Lower Cleaning Fee Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for highly rated 2BR entire homes on Maui and Kauai and favorited the home with the lower cleaning fee in the default Favorites wishlist.

evaluators.name: Big Island 3BR Pool Home Booking to Payment Step Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a 5-night Big Island stay for 6 guests in an entire home with 3+ bedrooms, pool, Wi-Fi, under $450/night, booked the cheapest qualifying option, and proceeded to the payment step without entering payment details while filling in the expected guest info.

evaluators.name: Honolulu Map Search & Honolulu Trip Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used map view in Honolulu with free parking, saved a rental within 0.5 miles of Waikiki Beach with free parking into a 'Honolulu Trip' wishlist, and viewed that wishlist.

evaluators.name: Maui Free-Cancellation Stay with Promo Code Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a 5-night September Maui stay for 2 adults with rating >= 4.7 and free cancellation 7+ days, booked a qualifying rental, and successfully applied a valid promo code.

evaluators.name: Kauai 21-Night Long-Stay Discount with Split Payment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a 21-night January stay on Kauai with a kitchen and long-stay discount, booked a qualifying rental under $3,500 pre-tax, and selected the 50/50 split payment option.

evaluators.name: Oahu Pet-Friendly Yard & Host Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a 2-night May weekend stay on Oahu with a pet, under $200/night, pet-friendly with outdoor space, and sent a host message asking if the yard is fully fenced for pets at a qualifying rental.

evaluators.name: Account & Summer 2026 Wishlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created/updated an account with Hawaii as the preferred destination and that a 'Summer 2026' wishlist contains at least one qualifying Maui rental (<=$300, >=4.5 rating) and one qualifying Oahu rental (<=$220, >=4.5 rating).
